description_long: This object is a tall, industrial-style guard rail constructed from a series of vertical concrete or metal posts connected by multiple taut strands of barbed wire. Each post is topped with a curved metal arm supporting a downward-facing lamp, suggesting it is designed for high-security or restricted urban areas such as perimeters of sensitive facilities. The posts are robust and weathered, with visible bolts and insulators for the wires, indicating durability and resistance to tampering. The barbed wire is evenly spaced and tightly strung, providing a formidable physical barrier. The lamps are utilitarian, likely intended to illuminate the area at night for surveillance or safety. The overall structure is imposing and utilitarian, prioritizing security and visibility.
description: A tall, industrial guard rail with concrete or metal posts, multiple strands of barbed wire, and overhead lamps for illumination, designed for high-security urban perimeters.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the curved lamp arms and the depth of the posts, highlighting the barbed wire and insulators.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the guard rail, the even spacing of the posts, and the alignment of the lamps.
description_view_2: Reverse oblique view emphasizing the rear of the posts and the curvature of the lamp arms.
description_view_3: Frontal view showing the face of the guard rail, the arrangement of the wires, and the lamps' positions.
